Name: Screen Space Ambient Occlusion
Description: Covers parameters relating to Screen Space Ambient Occlusion.

Fields.Name: Use Normal
Fields.Description: Enables the use of surface normals when calculating ambient occlusion for improved accuracy on edges and creases.

Fields.Name: Use Re-projection
Fields.Description: Uses temporal reprojection to stabilize SSAO over time and reduce flickering between frames.

Fields.Name: Prevent Ghosting
Fields.Description: Reduces temporal artifacts where previous-frame data incorrectly lingers in motion-heavy scenes.

Fields.Name: Enable Upscaling
Fields.Description: Enables upscaling of SSAO from a lower internal resolution for improved performance.

Fields.Name: Sample Offset
Fields.Description: Adjusts the sampling radius offset used when gathering occlusion samples around pixels.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Scale
Fields.Description: Controls the overall intensity of ambient occlusion shading.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Offset
Fields.Description: Biases SSAO results to reduce overly dark or overly bright occlusion response.

Fields.ID: SSAO - Edit-Ver2 Kernel Scale Base Dist
Fields.Name: Kernel Scale Base Distance
Fields.Description: Defines the reference distance at which SSAO sampling kernel scaling is centered.

Fields.Name: Kernel Scale Minimum
Fields.Description: Minimum allowed size of the SSAO sampling kernel at close distances.

Fields.Name: Kernel Scale Maximum
Fields.Description: Maximum allowed size of the SSAO sampling kernel at far distances.

Fields.Name: Previous Frame Strengh
Fields.Description: Controls how strongly previous-frame SSAO results influence the current frame for temporal stability.

Fields.Name: Depth Fade Start
Fields.Description: Distance at which SSAO begins fading out based on depth to reduce far-range artifacts.

Fields.Name: Depth Fade Range
Fields.Description: Range over which SSAO fades out with increasing depth.

Fields.Name: Precision Depth
Fields.Description: Improves depth buffer precision used in SSAO calculations to reduce banding and artifacts.

Fields.Name: Previous Frame Depth Aware
Fields.Description: Enables depth-aware temporal accumulation to better reject mismatched history samples.

Fields.Name: Depth Reject Rate
Fields.Description: Controls how aggressively outdated or mismatched depth samples are rejected in temporal SSAO.

Fields.Name: Geometry Bent Offset
Fields.Description: Adjusts the bias applied to bent normals used for directional ambient occlusion shading.
